# DryUI — Get Started

Install the CLI and set up DryUI in the current project.

## Step 1: Install the CLI

```
npm install -g @dryui/cli
```

## Step 2: Install the component library

```
npm install @dryui/ui
```

## Step 3: Run the setup checklist

```
dryui init
```

This prints the setup steps. Follow them:

1. Import the theme CSS in your root layout:

```svelte
<script>
  import '@dryui/ui/themes/default.css';
  import '@dryui/ui/themes/dark.css';
</script>
```

2. Set the document to automatic light/dark theming:

```html
<html class="theme-auto">
```

## Step 4: Use components

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button } from '@dryui/ui';
</script>

<Button>Click me</Button>
```

Run `dryui list` to see all available components.
Run `dryui info <component>` for any component's API reference.
Run `dryui compose <query>` for composition guidance.

## Full reference

See https://dryui.dev/llms.txt for the complete component API reference.
